mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, max_templates, max_fields_per_template, max_form_submissions, max_storage_mb, max_api_calls_daily, max_webhook_rules, current_templates, current_form_submissions, current_storage_mb, current_api_calls_daily, current_api_calls_date, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_tenant_quota (tenant_id, max_templates, max_fields_per_template, max_form_submissions, max_storage_mb, max_api_calls_daily, max_webhook_rules, current_templates, current_form_submissions, current_storage_mb, current_api_calls_daily, current_api_calls_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{maxTemplates}, #{maxFieldsPerTemplate}, #{maxFormSubmissions}, #{maxStorageMb}, #{maxApiCallsDaily}, #{maxWebhookRules}, 0, 0, 0, 0, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_tenant_quota SET current_templates = current_templates + #{delta}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
UPDATE sys_tenant_quota SET current_form_submissions = current_form_submissions + #{delta}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}

UPDATE sys_tenant_quota SET current_api_calls_daily = CASE WHEN current_api_calls_date = #{today} THEN current_api_calls_daily + 1 ELSE 1 END, current_api_calls_date = #{today}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
